description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a classic color-blocked design with red, white, and black panels. The upper is primarily constructed from smooth leather, with perforations on the toe box for breathability. A large black Nike Swoosh logo is prominently displayed on both sides, while the ankle collar is padded and finished in black. The shoe has black laces threaded through reinforced eyelets and a red tongue tag with white branding. The midsole is off-white, providing contrast to the vibrant upper, and the outsole is red, complementing the overall color scheme.
description: A high-top sneaker with red, white, and black leather panels, black laces, and a prominent Nike Swoosh logo. The shoe features a padded collar and a contrasting off-white midsole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large black Nike Swoosh, red and white leather panels, and the black padded collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the perforated white toe box, black laces, and red tongue tag with white branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the Nike Swoosh and color-blocked leather panels clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black padded collar, red heel panel, and the back seam of the shoe.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides, black Air Jordan wings logo on the upper side, and white Nike Air logo on the red tongue tag.
